codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior blocking issue: deleteHighlight() now evicts grouped highlights and all per-video highlight cache entries when videoId is unavailable, and the new regression test explicitly covers the stale /api/videos/{videoId}/highlights scenario.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture notes are stale for SSR filter forwarding and can mislead future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:29 still says URL type/ack filters are not forwarded in server load, but this was fixed by commit 4938092 (fix-ssr-bootstrap-url-filters).

summary: Reviewed original failed feature and fix commit. The prior failure (stale per-video highlight caches after deleteHighlight without videoId) is resolved in e63194e, and regression coverage now protects this path.
